lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਸਲੋਕਾ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag kee vaar mahalaa 4 salokaa naal |
lines.english: Vaar Of Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl, With Saloks:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਮਤਿ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa har sach man vasai nihachal mat apaar |
lines.english: The True Lord comes to abide forever in the mind, and your understanding becomes steady and unequalled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਸ੍ਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਹੈ ਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raagaa vich sreeraag hai je sach dhare piaar |
lines.english: Among the ragas, Siree Raag is the best, if it inspires you to enshrine love for the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਸਚੀ ਮਨੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਚਾ ਸਰੀਰ ਅਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa sachee man sachaa sachaa sareer akaar |
lines.english: The tongue becomes true, the mind becomes true, and the body becomes true as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ratan amolak paaeaa gur kaa sabad beechaar |
lines.english: The priceless jewel is obtained, by contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਬਿਰਹਾ ਸਭ ਧਾਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hor birahaa sabh dhaat hai jab lag saahib preet na hoe |
lines.english: All other loves are transitory, as long as people do not love their Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sachai satigur seviai sadaa sach vaapaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, forever true are the dealings of those who serve the True Guru. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਵੇਖਣੁ ਸੁਨਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man maaeaa mohiaa vekhan sunan na hoe |
lines.english: This mind is enticed by Maya-it cannot see or hear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹ ਦੇਖੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਊਪਜੈ ਅੰਧਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: seh dekhe bin preet na aoopajai andhaa kiaa karee |
lines.english: Without seeing her Husband Lord, love does not well up; what can the blind person do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨਿ ਅਖੀ ਲੀਤੀਆ ਸੋਈ ਸਚਾ ਦੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jin akhee leeteea soee sachaa dee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True One who takes away the eyes of spiritual wisdom-He alone can restore them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਕਰਤਾ ਇਕੁ ਇਕੋ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har iko karataa ik iko deebaan har |
lines.english: The Lord alone is the One Creator; there is only the One Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹਿ ਡਰੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har tis bin koee naeh ddar bhram bhau door kar |
lines.english: Without that Lord, there is no other at all. Remove your fear, doubt and dread.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੈ ਦਾ ਹੈ ਅਮਰੁ ਇਕੋ ਹਰਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਧਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har ikasai daa hai amar iko har chit dhar |
lines.english: The One Lord's Command is the One and Only-enshrine the One Lord in your consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤਿਸੈ ਨੋ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਜਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਰਖੈ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਘਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har tisai no saalaeh ji tudh rakhai baahar ghar |
lines.english: Praise that Lord who protects you, inside your home, and outside as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਭਉ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਤਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har jis no hoe deaal so har jap bhau bikham tar |1|
lines.english: When that Lord becomes merciful, and one comes to chant the Lord's Name, one swims across the ocean of fear. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤੀ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਸੰਦੀਆ ਕਿਆ ਚਲੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: daatee saahib sandeea kiaa chalai tis naal |
lines.english: The gifts belong to our Lord and Master; how can we compete with Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਜਾਗੰਦੇ ਨਾ ਲਹੰਨਿ ਇਕਨਾ ਸੁਤਿਆ ਦੇਇ ਉਠਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eik jaagande naa lahan ikanaa sutiaa dee utthaal |1|
lines.english: Some remain awake and aware, and do not receive these gifts, while others are awakened from their sleep to be blessed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਦਕੁ ਸਬੂਰੀ ਸਾਦਿਕਾ ਸਬਰੁ ਤੋਸਾ ਮਲਾਇਕਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: sidak sabooree saadikaa sabar tosaa malaaeikaan |
lines.english: Faith, contentment and tolerance are the food and provisions of the angels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਦਾਰੁ ਪੂਰੇ ਪਾਇਸਾ ਥਾਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਖਾਇਕਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: deedaar poore paaeisaa thaau naahee khaaeikaa |2|
lines.english: They obtain the Perfect Vision of the Lord, while those who gossip find no place of rest. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਆਪੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਆਪਿ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aape tudh upaae kai aap kaarai laaee |
lines.english: You Yourself created all; You Yourself delegate the tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖਿ ਵਿਗਸਦਾ ਆਪਣੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape vekh vigasadaa aapanee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: You Yourself are pleased, beholding Your Own Glorious Greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਭਨੀ ਹੀ ਥਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape aap varatadaa sabhanee hee thaaee |
lines.english: You Yourself are contained in all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੁਧਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har tudhahu baahar kichh naahee toon sachaa saaee |
lines.english: O Lord, there is nothing at all beyond You. You are the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਕੜ ਜਾਤੀ ਫਕੜੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: fakarr jaatee fakarr naau |
lines.english: Pride in social status is empty; pride in personal glory is useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤਿਸੈ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਹੁ ਜੋ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har tisai dhiaavahu sant janahu jo le chhaddaaee |2|
lines.english: Meditate on that Lord, O Saints; He shall rescue and save you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਇਕਾ ਛਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa jeea ikaa chhaau |
lines.english: The One Lord gives shade to all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਹੁ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਭਲਾ ਕਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aapahu je ko bhalaa kahaae |
lines.english: You may call yourself good;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਪੈ ਜਾ ਪਤਿ ਲੇਖੈ ਪਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak taa par jaapai jaa pat lekhai paae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, this will only be known when your honor is approved in God's Account. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਿਉ ਨੇਹੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਮਰਿ ਚਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis piaare siau nehu tis aagai mar chaleeai |
lines.english: Die before the one whom you love;

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਪਾਛੈ ਜੀਵਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhrig jeevan sansaar taa kai paachhai jeevanaa |2|
lines.english: to live after he dies is to live a worthless life in this world. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ ਚਾਰਿ ਹਟ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ਕਰੀਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: das chaar hatt tudh saajiaa vaapaar kareeve |
lines.english: You created the fourteen world-shops, in which Your Business is transacted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਾਜੀਐ ਚੰਦੁ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਦੁਇ ਦੀਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aape dharatee saajeeai chand sooraj due deeve |
lines.english: You Yourself created the earth, and the two lamps of the sun and the moon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਆਪਿ ਛੁਟੇ ਪਰਵਾਰ ਸਿਉ ਤਿਨ ਪਿਛੈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਛੁਟੀਵੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: oe aap chhutte paravaar siau tin pichhai sabh jagat chhutteeve |3|
lines.english: They themselves are saved, along with their family, and all those who follow them are saved as well. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪਈ ਜਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: tin jamakaal na viaapee jin sach amrit peeve |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not touch those who drink in the True Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਨੋ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਭੁ ਦੇਇ ਜੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਥੀਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa no har laabh dee jo guramukh theeve |
lines.english: The Lord bestows His Profits on those who become Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਵਸਿਆ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kudarat kar kai vasiaa soe |
lines.english: He created the Creative Power of the Universe, within which He dwells.
